title: stelis standleyi
intro: Stelis standleyi, also known as the Standley's stelis, is a species of orchid native to Central America. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Stelis standleyi include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
